span.p: STRATEGIC quadrant - partner - few suppliers high stakes

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: LEVERAGE quadrant - exploit buying power - many suppliers

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: BOTTLENECK quadrant - secure supply - low spend but fragile

span.p: NON-CRITICAL quadrant - simplify - low spend low risk
